summary: Comprehensive testing of Tennis Buddies Club - Backend APIs 100% working, Frontend core functionality working with session management issues affecting protected routes

ui_bugs.issue: Users get logged out frequently during navigation, preventing access to protected routes like Availability and Messages pages
Availability and Messages pages not accessible via navigation links for logged-in users - routes may not be properly protected or navigation links missing

integration_issues.issue: Admin panel only accessible to first registered user - correct behavior but makes comprehensive testing challenging

passed_tests: Homepage loads with stats (10 MEMBERS, 0 TEAMS, 1 MATCHES PLAYED)
User login flow with proper authentication
Solo Ladder page displays wins-only ranking correctly
Schedule page with calendar functionality working
Education page with categories (Technique, Strategy, Fitness, Equipment)
Backend API - All 21 endpoints working (100% success rate)
AI Chat API functionality (GPT-5.2 integration working)
Availability system API (set/get availability for Sundays)
Round Robin generation API (requires admin access)
action_item_for_main_agent: Critical Issue: Fix session management and authentication state persistence. Users are getting logged out during navigation which prevents access to protected routes (Availability, Messages). Ensure protected routes are properly accessible to authenticated users and navigation links are visible when logged in. Consider implementing proper JWT token refresh or session persistence.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Core functionality working, session management issues preventing full protected route testing
